visualGoal: Make a bind-drowned Star Citizen / Elite pilot want a labeled Stream Deck XL before they read the keystroke-only setup tax, while honestly showing the physical-panel alternative. Real product proof only; no procedural art. Only two verified space photos fit this topic, so the visual density is intentionally modest and the physical-DIY options are text + official link.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: Leo Bodnar BBI-32 Button Box Interface (Model 1, with connectors)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Wired-box route heart (32 buttons + 16 encoders, credit-card size). Text-only in body until a real photo is sourced. A marine-bay verified image exists (/images/gear/marine/leobodnar-bbi-32-button-box-interface.jpg) but is NOT in the space verified set — do not cross-embed; source a space-path photo or promote the marine one into verified-product-images.json under a shared path before embedding.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: DIY Arduino Pro Micro / Leonardo button box (built panel)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Full-DIY route. Ideally an original IgnitionSim build photo or a properly licensed community image; do NOT lift an unlicensed forum photo. Text-only in body until sourced.
Referenced as the dials option (~$180). Text-only; a verified photo would let the model-sizing section show the dials variant visually.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: Elgato Stream Deck + XL (36 keys + 6 dials, new 2026)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: The maximalist 2026 option (~$350). Text-only; low priority.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic dim home space-sim cockpit at night, cyan-and-amber monitor glow, a HOSAS twin-stick rig on desk mounts with an empty flat rectangular product-overlay space center-front where a real Stream Deck XL photo will be composited, cables neatly routed, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake stream deck keys, warped controls, unreadable tiny text, procedural gradient art, invented game HUD

infographicPrompts.title: Three ways to build a button box
content: Commercial panel - tactile buttons, no software, ~$90-160
DIY / wired box - real toggles + rotaries, build effort, ~$40-150 parts
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, three columns, large readable text, space cyan/amber palette, real product photos as column markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: Which Stream Deck for a space sim
content: Stream Deck XL - 32 keys, THE PICK, ~$200-250
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered ladder with the XL highlighted as the sweet spot, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

infographicPrompts.title: Button box buy order
content: 5 Add physical panel only if you crave switches
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered ladder, space palette, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult space-sim curator Val Chen at a tidy dual-stick desk cockpit, one hand resting near a labeled macro-panel overlay space, calm methodical energy, cable labels visible, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.item: Optional: a Stream Deck profile screenshot showing a color-coded Star Citizen page layout (flight / roles / UI / FPS)
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Only use an original or properly licensed capture. Not required for certification; would illustrate the 'sane page layout' section.

openQuestions: Source a space-path verified photo for the Leo Bodnar BBI-32 (a marine-bay verified image exists but is not in the space verified set) so the wired-box route can carry a visual.
Confirm the exact current retail price of the Stream Deck XL before certification (left as ~$200-250 / often ~$190).
Is how-to-bind-six-axes-hosas certified? It is linked in body + related; if not certified its /space/ page 404s.
Do we want dedicated gear pages for Stream Deck + / MK.2 / + XL, or keep them as text references under the single Stream Deck XL gear page?
